use_cases: Interactive landing page hero backgrounds with 3D rotating elements
Product showcase sections with user-controllable 3D models
Creative portfolio or portfolio website visual accents
SaaS dashboard or marketing page decorative 3D elements
ai_summary: A Three.js-powered 3D visualization component featuring a RoundedBoxGeometry with dynamic textures and interactive OrbitControls. The component renders an animated 3D scene with mouse-controlled rotation, damping effects, and real-world textures from Unsplash. Designed as a reusable, mixed-platform component suitable for hero sections, backgrounds, or interactive product displays with professional-grade WebGL rendering.
